config.enabled.name: Mod Enabled
config.allow-teleport.name: Allow Teleport From Preview
config.show-location-dropdown.name: Show Location Dropdown
config.show-location-dropdown.tooltip: Show the searchable location dropdown. Disable this to only preview the player's current location.
config.show-mini-map.name: Show Mini Map
config.show-mini-map.tooltip: Show a small local map during normal gameplay.
config.mini-map-size.name: Mini Map Size
config.mini-map-size.tooltip: Choose the size of the mini map.
config.mini-map-x.name: Mini Map X Position
config.mini-map-x.tooltip: Set the mini map window's horizontal position as a percentage of available screen space. 0 is left, 100 is right.
config.mini-map-y.name: Mini Map Y Position
config.mini-map-y.tooltip: Set the mini map window's vertical position as a percentage of available screen space. 0 is top, 100 is bottom.
config.npc-markers-full.name: NPC Map Locations On Full Map
config.npc-markers-full.tooltip: If NPC Map Locations is installed, show NPC and player markers on Mapster's full map.
config.npc-markers-mini.name: NPC Map Locations On Mini Map
config.npc-markers-mini.tooltip: If NPC Map Locations is installed, show NPC and player markers on Mapster's mini map.
config.npc-tooltips-full.name: NPC Tooltips On Full Map
config.npc-tooltips-full.tooltip: Show a name tooltip when hovering NPC Map Locations markers on Mapster's full map.
config.npc-tooltips-mini.name: NPC Tooltips On Mini Map
config.npc-tooltips-mini.tooltip: Show a name tooltip when hovering NPC Map Locations markers on Mapster's mini map.
config.mobile-phone.name: Mobile Phone App
config.mobile-phone.tooltip: If Mobile Phone is installed, add Mapster as an app on the phone. Turning this off after registration requires restarting the game to remove the icon from Mobile Phone.
config.animate-preview.name: Animate Map Preview
config.animate-preview.tooltip: Periodically refresh the map preview so animated tiles and sprites can update. Turn this off if another mod conflicts with preview rendering.
config.open-mapster.name: Open Mapster
config.debug-logging.name: Debug Logging
mobile-app.name: Mapster
menu.teleport-hint: Click the preview to warp to this relative map position.
